title: Selling Fonts Online Without PayPal: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: PayPal and Stripe do not make their exclusion lists public. They do not send you a letter explaining why your country is blocked. You find out when your account gets flagged, your funds get held for 180 days, or your application is rejected with a generic error message. Gumroad has payout delays that stretch to 30 days for sellers in certain regions, and Payhip quietly limits withdrawal options based on geography. These are not edge cases — they are the designed experience for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Kenya, Ethiopia, and dozens of other countries. The solution is not a workaround. It is a different infrastructure stack entirely: crypto payments through NOWPayments, automated delivery, and a store that no platform can suspend because no platform owns it.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip promise all-in-one solutions but fail creators in restricted countries. PayPal and Stripe require KYC and bank accounts they don’t support in your region. Gumroad and Payhip lean on these processors, so they’re equally useless. Crypto-native tools like Unchained Commerce’s Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) cut out middlemen entirely. You get automated delivery, multi-chain payments, and no buyer accounts required. Tradeoff: You handle setup, but you own the infrastructure. Conventional platforms rent you a temporary solution; crypto tools give you permanent control.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe exclude countries based on banking regulations, sanctions, or risk. Gumroad and Payhip inherit these restrictions because they rely on PayPal/Stripe. Crypto-native infrastructure bypasses this entirely. Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine ($49.99) works globally because it uses NOWPayments—300+ coins, no KYC, no buyer accounts. If your country’s banking system is blocked, crypto is your structural alternative. Conventional platforms lock you out; crypto tools let you build despite the system.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal and Stripe hold funds for days or weeks, charge 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction, and freeze accounts without warning. Gumroad and Payhip add their own 10% cut. Crypto payments settle in minutes, cost 1% or less in network fees, and can’t be frozen. Unchained Commerce’s Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) supports BTC, ETH, USDT, and 300+ coins with live price feeds. Tradeoff: Volatility risk, but stablecoins like USDT eliminate it. Conventional platforms win on simplicity but lose on speed, cost, and reliability.
PayPal and Stripe block creators in Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan—crypto infrastructure doesn’t.

PayPal and Stripe require manual verification for digital goods, slowing delivery. Gumroad and Payhip automate this but fail if their processors block you. Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine ($49.99) automates delivery instantly—payment verified, font delivered, PDF receipt sent. No manual steps. Crypto tools win here. Conventional platforms automate partially but break in restricted regions. Crypto infrastructure automates fully, globally, permanently.
